summary: Public SEO Pages Testing Complete. All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend pages load correctly without login, with proper SEO meta tags, navigation, and conversion CTAs.

minor.issue: Cache key doesn't include limit parameter - always returns cached 20 items regardless of limit query param

issues: Meta description shows default 'A product of emergent.sh' from index.html instead of Helmet-set SEO description (known CSR limitation without SSR)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/trending-products returns 200 (no auth required)
Backend: Response has products array, total count, and detected_this_week
Backend: Each product has required fields: id, slug, product_name, launch_score, margin_percent, trend_stage
Backend: GET /api/public/product/{slug} returns 200 with valid slug
Backend: Product detail has id, slug, product_name, launch_score, margin_percent, trend_stage, estimated_retail_price, supplier_cost, related_products
Backend: Related products array has correct structure with id, slug, product_name, launch_score, trend_stage, image_url
Backend: GET /api/public/product/nonexistent-slug returns 404 with 'Product not found' detail
Backend: Both public endpoints work without any authentication headers
Backend: Response caching works (5-minute TTL)
Backend: Health check returns healthy status
Frontend: /trending-products page loads without login
Frontend: Page title includes 'Trending' and 'TrendScout AI'
Frontend: Week count indicator shows 'X products detected this week'
Frontend: Product grid displays 20 product cards
Frontend: Each card shows product name, launch score, margin %, trend stage
Frontend: 'Unlock full analysis' button links to /trending/:slug
Frontend: TrendScout logo links to /
Frontend: 'Get Started' nav button links to /signup
Frontend: Bottom CTA 'Start with TrendScout' links to /signup
Frontend: /trending/:slug page loads without login
Frontend: Product detail shows title, launch score, margin, retail price, supplier cost
Frontend: Product overview card describes the product
Frontend: 'Unlock full analysis with TrendScout' CTA links to /signup
Frontend: 'All Trending' nav button links to /trending-products
Frontend: Related Trending Products section shows 4 related products with links
Frontend: 404 page shows 'Product not found' for invalid slugs with back link
action_items: MINOR: Consider adding limit param to cache key in /api/public/trending-products for proper limit support
MINOR: Remove duplicate route '/trending/:slug' -> SeoPage in App.js (line 113) - currently shadowed by TrendingProductPage route
critical_code_review_comments: App.js has duplicate route: line 111 '/trending/:slug' -> TrendingProductPage AND line 113 '/trending/:slug' -> SeoPage. The second route is never reached.
For true SEO value, consider implementing Server-Side Rendering (SSR) or Static Site Generation (SSG) for /trending/* pages so crawlers see proper meta tags
test_credentials: None required - public pages accessible without authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public SEO pages complete: (1) /trending-products - public grid page with 20 product cards, each showing launch_score, margin_percent, trend_stage. Products come from /api/public/trending-products endpoint which prioritizes radar_detected products. (2) /trending/:slug - individual product SEO page with full metrics, product overview, unlock CTA, and related products. Data from /api/public/product/{slug} endpoint. (3) Both endpoints use 5-min TTL caching. (4) 404 handling shows friendly 'Product not found' page. (5) Duplicate route issue in App.js - SeoPage route is shadowed.

Public SEO Pages.trending_products_api: GET /api/public/trending-products returns products with slug, launch_score, margin_percent, trend_stage, detected_this_week count
Public SEO Pages.product_detail_api: GET /api/public/product/{slug} returns product detail with related_products array
Public SEO Pages.404_handling: GET /api/public/product/invalid-slug returns 404 with proper error message
Public SEO Pages.frontend_grid_page: /trending-products loads without login, shows product cards with unlock buttons
Public SEO Pages.frontend_detail_page: /trending/:slug loads without login with product metrics and CTA
Public SEO Pages.seo_meta_tags: Pages have Helmet-managed title, og:title, twitter:card (note: meta description limited by CSR)
Public SEO Pages.json_ld: Product schema structured data included via Helmet
Public SEO Pages.conversion_ctas: Unlock buttons and Start with TrendScout buttons link to /signup
